title: Carry question origin through openQuestions and resolvedQuestions
summary: Extend reducer question records with origin, source, and injectedAtIteration so angle-bank questions remain attributable after they resolve.

title: Render dashboard attribution for angle-bank versus analyst-authored question coverage
summary: Add dashboard counts and badges so coverage can be read by question origin, not just by source file.

title: Keep provenance in structured reducer state, not markdown comments inside key-questions
summary: Because parseStrategyQuestions only reads checkbox text and updateStrategyContent rewrites the anchor, comments beside strategy bullets are not a durable provenance channel.
Iteration 25 already mapped injected-question inbox records and promotion metadata; this iteration narrows the recommendation to registry/dashboard attribution for coverage by origin.

Yes, reduce-state.cjs should stamp injected versus analyst-authored questions, but the durable stamp should be structured registry metadata and dashboard output rather than comments inside the key-questions markdown block.
